description: Fix unguarded JSON.parse() on the panels parameter in create_dashboard that throws a native SyntaxError when invalid JSON is passed.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/grafana && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Wrap JSON.parse(params.panels) in try-catch in create_dashboard
userStories.description: In plugins/grafana/src/tools/create-dashboard.ts, params.panels (a JSON string provided by the AI caller) is passed directly to JSON.parse() at line 33 without try-catch. Invalid JSON throws a native SyntaxError instead of a ToolError.validation(). Wrap the JSON.parse call in a try-catch and throw ToolError.validation() with a descriptive message.
acceptanceCriteria: The JSON.parse(params.panels) call in create-dashboard.ts is wrapped in try-catch
Invalid JSON in panels throws ToolError.validation with a descriptive message
Valid JSON panels strings are still parsed and used correctly in the dashboard creation request
